settings.heading: Common questions, answered clearly
settings.copy: Start here for the questions customers ask most before moving into troubleshooting or support.
settings.support_note: Come here for the broad answers first. When a question becomes product-specific, the next support path stays close.

settings.heading: Frequently asked questions
settings.copy: Find the broad answers here first, then move into a deeper support path only when the question becomes product-specific.

settings.heading: Move into the next support path when the FAQ is not enough
settings.copy: Keep the next step close when an answer leads into setup, compatibility, downloads, troubleshooting, or direct support.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Open setup guides and user documentation when the next step needs more detailed instructions.

settings.title: Troubleshooting
settings.copy: Move into symptom-based help when the answer depends on a specific issue or behavior.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Reach support directly when the answer depends on a more specific product or setup question.

settings.heading: Need a deeper support path?
settings.copy: Move into downloads, manuals, troubleshooting, or direct contact when the FAQ is not enough.
